question.label: Sponsorship need
question.name: What kind of sponsorship would actually change the way your work lands here?
question.description: Explores whether external backing is the missing ingredient without assuming it is.

answer: I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle, not only retrospective feedback.

assessment.note: Names the absence of forward-looking milestones and timely feedback as the missing sponsorship signal; this is a strong growth deficit, with some drag on engagement and sustainability.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked through, what would you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: If we define two concrete leadership bets for this half, I can commit fully.
I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle, not only retrospective feedback.
Sometimes I avoid high-ambiguity forums because I do not want to sound underprepared.
I think I need to own a cross-org decision area, not just deliver strong design outcomes.
